privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At UnlockHub we take your privacy seriously. This screen is a summary of our policy. You can read the full version at the link below.
privacy.data_collected_body: We collect your email, username, game stats and achievements linked to the platforms you connect (Steam, RetroAchievements). We never sell your data to third parties.
privacy.ads_body: The app displays ads through Google AdMob. AdMob may use device identifiers to show you relevant ads, subject to your consent. You can manage your preferences in your device settings.
privacy.contact_body: If you have questions about your privacy or want to exercise your GDPR rights (access, rectification, deletion), write to us at privacy@unlockhub.app.
privacy.full_policy_label: Open the full privacy policy in the browser

link_platform.guide_title: How do I get the credentials?

psn.title: Link PlayStation Network
psn.description: Enter your PSN username. Your profile must be public to sync your trophies.
psn.username_hint: The username of your PlayStation Network account
psn.guide_title: How to make your profile public?
psn.guide_step1: Open the PlayStation app on your phone or go to Settings from your console.
psn.guide_step2: Go to Settings → Privacy → Gaming Privacy.
psn.guide_step3: Set «Trophies» to «Anyone» so your trophies are visible.
psn.submit_label: Submit your PSN username to link your PlayStation account
psn.error_empty: The PSN username cannot be empty.
psn.error_not_found: No PSN account found with that username. Please check that the username is correct.
psn.error_already_linked: This PlayStation account is already linked to another UnlockHub user.
psn.error_service_unavailable: The PSN service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
psn.privacy_note: We only need your public PSN username. No personal token is stored.
psn.profile_private_body: Your PSN profile has trophies set to private. Trophies won't sync until you make your profile public on PlayStation.
psn.profile_private_step1: Open the PlayStation app on your phone or go to Settings from your console.
psn.profile_private_step2: Go to your Profile → Privacy Settings.
psn.profile_private_step3: Set «Gaming Privacy» to «Anyone» so your trophies are visible.
psn.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your PlayStation account? Sync data will be removed.

xbox.title: Link Xbox
xbox.description: Connect your Xbox Live account with your Microsoft account. You'll be redirected to Microsoft login.
xbox.coming_soon_body: Xbox integration is in development and will be available in an upcoming update.
xbox.submit_label: Open browser to authenticate with your Microsoft account and link Xbox
xbox.error_failed: Could not link your Xbox account. Please try again.
xbox.privacy_note: Only a Microsoft refresh token is stored, encrypted with AES-256. We never access your Microsoft password.
xbox.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your Xbox account? Sync data will be removed.

steam.title: Link Steam
steam.description: Enter your Steam username. Your profile must be public to sync your achievements.
steam.username_hint: Your Steam username or SteamID64 (17 digits)
steam.guide_title: Where do I find my username?
steam.guide_step1: Open Steam and click on your profile name in the top-right corner.
steam.guide_step2: Your username is the display name on your profile (not necessarily your real name).
steam.guide_step3: You can also use your SteamID64 directly — a 17-digit number. Find it at steamid.io.
steam.guide_public_warning: Your Steam profile must be set to Public for sync to work. If it's private, achievements won't load.
steam.submit_label: Submit your Steam username to link your account
steam.error_not_found: No Steam account found with that username. Please check that it is correct.
steam.error_already_linked: This Steam account is already linked to another UnlockHub user.
steam.error_service_unavailable: The Steam service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
steam.privacy_note: We only need your public Steam username. No personal API key is stored.
steam.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your Steam account? Sync data will be removed.

ra.title: Link RetroAchievements
ra.description: Enter your RetroAchievements username. Your profile must be public.
ra.username_hint: The username you use on retroachievements.org
ra.guide_title: Where do I find my username?
ra.guide_step1: Create a free account at retroachievements.org if you don't have one yet.
ra.guide_step2: Your username is the display name on your RetroAchievements profile.
ra.guide_step3: Make sure your profile is public so your achievements can be synced.
ra.guide_public_warning: Your RetroAchievements profile must be public for sync to work.
ra.submit_label: Submit your username to link your RetroAchievements account
ra.error_not_found: No RetroAchievements account found with that username. Please check that it is correct.
ra.error_already_linked: This RetroAchievements account is already linked to another UnlockHub user.
ra.error_service_unavailable: The RetroAchievements service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
ra.privacy_note: We only need your public RetroAchievements username. No personal API key is stored.
ra.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your RetroAchievements account? Sync data will be removed.

onboarding.step1_body: The unified tracker for your gaming achievements. Connect Steam, RetroAchievements and PlayStation in one place.
onboarding.step2_body: Connect your gaming accounts and we'll sync all your achievements automatically. Start with Steam or RetroAchievements.
onboarding.step3_body: Compete in global rankings, challenge your friends, and track your gaming legacy. Your journey starts now.
